caption: The video features a man with a distinctive gray wig styled in a unique manner, wearing a white shirt, yellow suspenders, and a patterned bow tie. He is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logos on the screen. The man is wearing headphones and appears to be engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand as he speaks. In the background, there is a woman in a green top and red hat, who seems to be walking past the recording area. The setting includes various posters and signs, one of which reads "Unique Fabrics," adding to the casual yet professional atmosphere of the scene.
